# Storage Volume Group

**Status**: [Development][DocumentStatus]

This document defines semantic conventions for storage volume groups.

## Storage Volume Group Entity

A storage volume group is a logical collection of volumes that are managed together
for operations such as snapshots or replication.

<!-- semconv entity.storage.volumegroup -->
